Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vessels]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Vessels are powerful objects that a Soulbound person is bound to during the Awakening procedure.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Vessels are associated with the Soulbound.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Vessels are entities or powers within a person that can react to their emotions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The character possesses Vessels that howl at her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Estyr Six's Vessels nagged her to reduce the Navigators to splinters.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Vessels are entities that can float.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Vessels are items that can be placed in sealing boxes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera tells the Farstriders to release their Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr has Vessels sitting on a table next to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Vessels provide voices that can slam into a user's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera's Vessels delivered an impulse that drowned out her thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera's Vessels spoke in unison to tell her to flee.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
